import React from "react"; import { useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'; import './App.css'; import dgvcl from './dgvcl.png'; import QR from './DGVCL_qrcode.png'; // import { BrowserRouter, Route, Routes, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; // import Name from "./App.jsx"; function Main() { const location = useLocation(); const data = location.state || {}; return (

Dakshin Gujrat Vij Company Limited

Reg. Office: Urja Sadan, Nana Varachha Road, SURAT - 395006

CIN: U89876J54M446
GST No: U89876J54M446
website: dgvcl.com

Electricity Consumption Bill

Helpline No:
1800-233-3003

{data.Name}Add: {data.Address}Mobile: {data.mobile}{data.city}{data.district}Census Code: {data.census}Feeder Code/Name: {data.feeder}
Subdivision Name {data.subdivision}
Mobile No {data.mobile}
Route Code {data.routecode}
Bill Month {data.billmonth}
Bill Date {data.billdate}
Due Date {data.duedate}
Duration of Meter Reading
From Date {data.fromdate} to Date {data.todate}

Scan QR To Pay

Consumer No: {data.consumerno} Bill No Ind Type Security Deposit seasonal days
Meter No: {data.meterno} Tarrif NRGP {data.security}
Phase MF Meter Status Max Demand Feeder Code Meter Rent Code HP/KW Lock Ind Lock Days
S 1 {data.maxdemand} {data.feedercode} {data.meterrent} {data.hpkw}
Unit Reactive Unit Peak Unit Off Peak Unit Sr. No. Bill Details Rs. / Ps.
Current Reading {data.unitcr} {data.reactiveunitcr} {data.peakunitcr} {data.offpeakunitcr} 1 Fixed Charge {data.fixedcharge}
Past Reading {data.unitpr} {data.reactiveunitpr} {data.peakunitpr} {data.offpeakunitpr} 2 Energy Charge {data.energycharge}
Consumption {data.unitc} {data.reactiveunitc} {data.peakunitc} {data.offpeakunitc} 3 Minimum Charge {data.mincharge}
Bi-directional meter Import Export Import-TOD Export-TOD 4 Reactive Charge {data.reactivecharge}
Current Reading 0 0 5 TOU Charge {data.toucharge}
Past Reading 0 0 6 Fuel Charge @2.3 {data.fuelcharge}
Consumption 0 0 7 Electricity Duty @20 {data.eleduty}
); } export default Main;
